'''sajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wontly|wontly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wontly|wontly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sajate|sajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sajatesher|sajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajatesherĂ«m|sajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sajatero|sajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sajateshĂ«|sajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajateshĂ«m|sajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisajatero|gokisajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisajateshĂ«|gokisajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajateshĂ«m|gokisajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosajankerom|gosajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosajankeshĂ«|gosajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajankeshĂ«m|gosajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosajankeya|gosajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sajaterom|sajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajatemu|sajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sajateya|sajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisajaterom|gokisajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajatemu|gokisajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisajateya|gokisajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sajajate|sajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sajajatesher|sajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajajatesherĂ«m|sajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sajajatero|sajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sajajateshĂ«|sajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajajateshĂ«m|sajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisajajatero|gokisajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisajajateshĂ«|gokisajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajajateshĂ«m|gokisajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosajajankerom|gosajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosajajankeshĂ«|gosajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosajajankeshĂ«m|gosajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosajajankeya|gosajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sajajaterom|sajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sajajatemu|sajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sajajateya|sajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisajajaterom|gokisajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisajajatemu|gokisajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisajajateya|gokisajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠte|sĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠtesher|sĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠtero|sĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠtero|gokisĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠterom|sĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠtemu|sĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠjĂŠteya|sĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠterom|gokisĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠjĂŠteya|gokisĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safjafte|safjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safjaftesher|safjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safjaftesherĂ«m|safjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safjaftero|safjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safjafteshĂ«|safjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safjafteshĂ«m|safjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafjaftero|gokisafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafjafteshĂ«|gokisafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafjafteshĂ«m|gokisafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafjafnkerom|gosafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafjafnkeshĂ«|gosafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafjafnkeshĂ«m|gosafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafjafnkeya|gosafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safjafterom|safjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safjaftemu|safjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safjafteya|safjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafjafterom|gokisafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafjaftemu|gokisafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafjafteya|gokisafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
